choices.text: Ask who was around
Ask about the time window
Ask about prior contact
Press the contradiction
Pin down the exact location
Frame it as the victim bringing trouble
Frame it as pressure and circumstance
Frame it as someone trying to protect something
Frame it as something that got out of hand

nodes.text: You keep asking for names like the city hands them over for free. I saw movement near {place}. If you need a face to bother, bother {suspect}.

choices.text: Ask whether anyone else was there
Ask what made the figure stand out

nodes.text: Maybe. Maybe not. People come in pairs when they are scared and alone when they are sure. I could not tell which kind this was.
They moved like somebody who had already decided what story they were going to tell later.
{time_phrase}. Close enough for paperwork. Not close enough for me to bet my neck on your minute hand.

choices.text: Ask what happened just before
Ask what happened just after

nodes.text: Before that, the block was pretending to be normal. Then it started listening to itself too hard.
After that, everything got careful. That is what bothered me. Fear usually makes noise. This made discipline.
I know {suspect}. Knowing somebody does not mean I owe you the easy version of them.

choices.text: Ask whether they ever spoke
Ask whether the witness trusted them

nodes.text: Enough words to know where to stop the next conversation. That is all.
Trust is for people who can afford being wrong. I settle for prediction.
There it is. The part where you decide my memory owes you a cleaner outline than the night ever gave me.

choices.text: Tell them the times do not match
Tell them they are withholding the useful part

nodes.text: Fine. I shifted the time. You push people hard enough, they start editing themselves before they finish the sentence.
I am withholding the part that gets witnesses remembered by the wrong people. You want brave; I want tomorrow.
Exact location? The exact location was a bad angle, wet pavement, and me realizing too late that I should have gone home.

choices.text: Ask for the doorway or side of the building
Ask what the witness could actually see

nodes.text: Near the side nobody lingers on unless they are hiding or waiting to stop hiding.
Enough to feel danger before I could name it. Not enough to make me noble about it.
You want me to say the victim had it coming so the file gets simpler. Files love simple. Streets do not.

choices.text: Ask whether the victim invited the danger
Ask whether the witness is shifting blame

nodes.text: I am saying nobody here walks around untouched by bad decisions. That still does not hand anybody a license.
Maybe I am shifting it because carrying all of it alone would break the spine of the story.
Circumstance is what people call it when they want the truth to sound less personal. Pressure, debt, shame, loyalty. Pick whichever one fits your report.

choices.text: Ask what pressure was building
Ask whether the witness is excusing it

nodes.text: The kind that sits on a person for weeks and then borrows one ugly night to finish the job.
No. I am telling you the weather around this thing was bad long before the strike.
People love saying they were protecting somebody. It makes the mess sound almost holy.

choices.text: Ask who was supposed to be protected
Ask whether that story sounds convenient

nodes.text: Could be family. Could be pride. Could be the version of themselves they were trying not to lose.
Convenient enough that people reach for it with bloody hands and expect applause.
Accident is what gets said after panic puts on a tie. Maybe it started wrong by surprise. It did not stay that way.

choices.text: Ask whether it looked sudden
Ask whether someone tried to fix it after

nodes.text: Sudden enough to startle. Not sudden enough to excuse everything that followed.
That is the only part I feel sure of. Somebody lingered long enough to think about appearances.
